workflow.name: Create a Rain Particle System
workflow.description: Build a Niagara rain VFX system with falling droplets, splash effects on collision, and configurable intensity for weather systems.
prerequisites: Niagara plugin enabled in the project

steps.purpose: Create a new Niagara System for rain
Add a fountain/spray emitter as the base rain emitter
Set spawn rate to 500+ particles per second for rain density
Set particle lifetime to 1-2 seconds for fall duration
Configure gravity force for realistic fall speed
Set particle size to thin elongated shape for rain streaks
Add a second emitter for splash effects on collision
Configure collision module for ground impact detection
Spawn the rain system in the level to preview

workflow.expectedOutcome: A complete rain VFX system with configurable density, realistic fall physics, and splash effects on ground collision

readme: Adjust spawn rate for rain intensity. For indoor scenes, reduce the spawn box size. The splash emitter uses collision events from the rain emitter.
